title: AWeber vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: AWeber vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between AWeber and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. AWeber is built for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. AWeber wins for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
